name: Ohio
why_ruby_pro: Ohio DOLC compliance built into every transaction
Handle Ohio's hybrid control/open system without workarounds
Excise tax automation for wine and beer distribution
problem: Ohio's hybrid system means different rules for spirits vs. wine and beer

Account-level price books with built-in compliance validation
how_it_works: Ruby knows Ohio's excise rates by product type — wine, beer, mixed
Compliance reporting generated from the same data you use for orders
Track depletion, margins, and territory performance across Ohio
